145	    (A : Type*) [CommRing A] [IsDomain A] [IsNoetherianRing A]
146	    (d : ℕ) (hd : 0 < d) (T : Type*) [AddCommGroup T]
147	    [Module (MvPolynomial (Fin d) A) T] [Module.Finite (MvPolynomial (Fin d) A) T]
148	    [Module A T] [IsScalarTower A (MvPolynomial (Fin d) A) T]
149	    (htors : Module.IsTorsion (MvPolynomial (Fin d) A) T) :
150	    ∃ (g : A) (_ : g ≠ 0) (m' : ℕ) (_ : m' < d)
151	      (_ : Module (MvPolynomial (Fin m') (Localization.Away g))
152	              (LocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers g) T))
153	      (_ : Module (Localization.Away g) (LocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers g) T))
154	      (_ : IsScalarTower (Localization.Away g)
155	              (MvPolynomial (Fin m') (Localization.Away g))
156	              (LocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers g) T)),
157	      Module.Finite (MvPolynomial (Fin m') (Localization.Away g))
158	        (LocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers g) T)
159	-- can fix m' = d - 1 (single-variable elimination); strong induction accepts any m' < d.

415	          (show Submonoid.powers g ≤ Submonoid.comap (RingHom.id A) (nonZeroDivisors A) by

418	          : Localization.Away g →+* FractionRing A)) := by
419	  classical

421	    p.support (fun i => MvPolynomial.coeff i p)

423	  have hle : Submonoid.powers (↑s : A) ≤ Submonoid.comap (RingHom.id A) (nonZeroDivisors A) := by

427	  have hunit : IsUnit (algebraMap A (Localization.Away (↑s : A)) ↑s) :=

434	    · obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := hs i hi
435	      exact ⟨a, by rw [ha, Algebra.smul_def]⟩
436	    · exact ⟨0, by rw [MvPolynomial.notMem_support_iff.mp hi]; simp⟩
437	  choose a ha using hnum

439	      = algebraMap A (FractionRing A) ↑s := by rw [hφ, IsLocalization.map_eq]; rfl

-- FINITENESS over the finer `g` (see the integral-clearing block `hgen`/`g1`).
  -- Each `A`-algebra generator `x ∈ σ` maps to an element of `B_g` integral over
  -- `MvPoly A_g` via `φ` (transport the `hgen` integrality through `ν`, dividing by
  -- the unit `C (aGen x)`), and the generator images adjoin to `⊤`; hence
  -- `finite_adjoin_of_finite_of_isIntegral` yields module-finiteness.
  have hfin : letI := φ.toAlgebra;
      Module.Finite (MvPolynomial (Fin s) (Localization.Away g))
        (Localization.Away (algebraMap A B g)) := by
    letI := φ.toAlgebra
    -- (I) each generator image is integral over `MvPoly A_g`.
    have hgenint : ∀ x ∈ σ, _root_.IsIntegral (MvPolynomial (Fin s) (Localization.Away g))
        (algebraMap B (Localization.Away (algebraMap A B g)) x) := by
      sorry
    -- (II) the generator images adjoin to `⊤`.
    have hadj : Algebra.adjoin (MvPolynomial (Fin s) (Localization.Away g))
        ((algebraMap B (Localization.Away (algebraMap A B g))) '' (σ : Set B)) = ⊤ := by
      sorry
    -- (III) assemble.
    have hfa : Module.Finite (MvPolynomial (Fin s) (Localization.Away g))
        ↥(Algebra.adjoin (MvPolynomial (Fin s) (Localization.Away g))
          ((algebraMap B (Localization.Away (algebraMap A B g))) '' (σ : Set B))) :=
      Algebra.finite_adjoin_of_finite_of_isIntegral
        (Set.Finite.image _ σ.finite_toSet)
        (by rintro _ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩; exact hgenint x hx)
    rw [hadj] at hfa
    exact hfa.equiv (Subalgebra.topEquiv.toLinearEquiv)
  exact ⟨s, g, hgne, algAgBg, φ, hφ_inj, hfin⟩

    -- `hgen` integrality (over `MvPoly A`, in `B_K`) up the tower `MvPoly A →
    -- MvPoly A_g`, divide by the unit `C (aGen x)`, then descend through the
    -- injective `MvPoly A_g`-algebra map `ν : B_g → B_K`.
    have hgenint : ∀ x ∈ σ, _root_.IsIntegral (MvPolynomial (Fin s) (Localization.Away g))
        (algebraMap B (Localization.Away (algebraMap A B g)) x) := by
      letI algAAg : Algebra (MvPolynomial (Fin s) A) (MvPolynomial (Fin s) (Localization.Away g)) :=
        MvPolynomial.algebraMvPolynomial
      letI algAgBK : Algebra (MvPolynomial (Fin s) (Localization.Away g))
          (TensorProduct A (FractionRing A) B) :=
        ((gK : MvPolynomial (Fin s) (FractionRing A) →+* _).comp (MvPolynomial.map ψ)).toAlgebra
      haveI towerA : IsScalarTower (MvPolynomial (Fin s) A)
          (MvPolynomial (Fin s) (Localization.Away g)) (TensorProduct A (FractionRing A) B) := by
        refine IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_eq fun p => ?_
        show gK (MvPolynomial.map (algebraMap A (FractionRing A)) p)
          = gK (MvPolynomial.map ψ (MvPolynomial.map (algebraMap A (Localization.Away g)) p))
        rw [MvPolynomial.map_map,
          show ψ.comp (algebraMap A (Localization.Away g)) = algebraMap A (FractionRing A) from
            IsLocalization.lift_comp hg_unit_K]
      -- `ν` is a `MvPoly A_g`-algebra map (this is `hcomp`).
      let νA : (Localization.Away (algebraMap A B g)) →ₐ[MvPolynomial (Fin s) (Localization.Away g)]
          (TensorProduct A (FractionRing A) B) :=
        { ν with commutes' := fun c => RingHom.congr_fun hcomp c }
      intro x hx
      rw [← isIntegral_algHom_iff νA hν_inj]
      have hνx : νA (algebraMap B (Localization.Away (algebraMap A B g)) x)
          = algebraMap B (TensorProduct A (FractionRing A) B) x := by
        show ν (algebraMap B _ x) = _
        rw [hν_def]; exact IsLocalization.lift_eq hg_unit_BK x
      rw [hνx]
      set z := algebraMap B (TensorProduct A (FractionRing A) B) x with hz_def
      -- integrality of `C (aGen x) • z` over `MvPoly A`, lifted to `MvPoly A_g`.
      have htop : _root_.IsIntegral (MvPolynomial (Fin s) (Localization.Away g))
          ((MvPolynomial.C (aGen x) : MvPolynomial (Fin s) A) • z) := (haGen_int x).tower_top
      set w : MvPolynomial (Fin s) (Localization.Away g) :=
        algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin s) A) (MvPolynomial (Fin s) (Localization.Away g))
          (MvPolynomial.C (aGen x)) with hw_def
      have hw_smul : (MvPolynomial.C (aGen x) : MvPolynomial (Fin s) A) • z = w • z :=
        (IsScalarTower.algebraMap_smul (MvPolynomial (Fin s) (Localization.Away g))
          (MvPolynomial.C (aGen x)) z).symm
      rw [hw_smul] at htop
      -- `w = C (algebraMap A A_g (aGen x))` is a unit, so we may divide it out.
      have hag_dvd : aGen x ∣ g := by
        refine dvd_trans (Finset.dvd_prod_of_mem aGen hx) ?_
        rw [hg_def]; exact dvd_mul_left g1 g0
      have haunit : IsUnit (algebraMap A (Localization.Away g) (aGen x)) :=
        isUnit_of_dvd_unit (map_dvd (algebraMap A (Localization.Away g)) hag_dvd)
          (IsLocalization.map_units (Localization.Away g)
            (⟨g, Submonoid.mem_powers _⟩ : Submonoid.powers g))
      have hwC : w = MvPolynomial.C (algebraMap A (Localization.Away g) (aGen x)) := by
        rw [hw_def]; rfl
      have hwunit : IsUnit w := by rw [hwC]; exact haunit.map MvPolynomial.C
      have key : _root_.IsIntegral (MvPolynomial (Fin s) (Localization.Away g))
          ((↑hwunit.unit⁻¹ : MvPolynomial (Fin s) (Localization.Away g)) • (w • z)) := by
        rw [Algebra.smul_def]
        exact isIntegral_algebraMap.mul htop
      have hzeq : (↑hwunit.unit⁻¹ : MvPolynomial (Fin s) (Localization.Away g)) • (w • z) = z := by
        rw [smul_smul,
          show (↑hwunit.unit⁻¹ : MvPolynomial (Fin s) (Localization.Away g)) * w = 1 by
            rw [← hwunit.unit_spec]; exact Units.inv_mul _,
          one_smul]
      rwa [hzeq] at key

          ((algebraMap B (Localization.Away (algebraMap A B g))) '' (σ : Set B)) = ⊤ := by

        set Ag := Localization.Away g with hAgdef

            = (Localization.awayMap (algebraMap A B) g) a := fun _ => rfl

          intro c
          have hc : c ∈ Algebra.adjoin A (σ : Set B) := by rw [hσ]; exact Algebra.mem_top

          | mem y hy => exact Algebra.subset_adjoin (Set.mem_image_of_mem _ hy)
          | algebraMap a =>
              have hsqa : algebraMap Ag Bg (algebraMap A Ag a)
                  = algebraMap B Bg (algebraMap A B a) := by
                rw [hsq, Localization.awayMap, IsLocalization.Away.map, IsLocalization.map_eq]
              rw [← hsqa]; exact T.algebraMap_mem _
          | add y₁ y₂ _ _ h₁ h₂ => rw [map_add]; exact T.add_mem h₁ h₂
          | mul y₁ y₂ _ _ h₁ h₂ => rw [map_mul]; exact T.mul_mem h₁ h₂
        -- the inverse of the image of `g` lies in `T` (it comes from `A_g`).
        have hu : IsUnit (algebraMap B Bg (algebraMap A B g)) :=
          IsLocalization.map_units Bg

        have hvg : IsUnit (algebraMap A Ag g) :=

        have hsqg : algebraMap Ag Bg (algebraMap A Ag g) = algebraMap B Bg (algebraMap A B g) := by

Explanation: The rewrite tactic rewrites an expression 'e' using an equality 'a = b' by the following process. First, it looks for all 'a' in 'e'. Second, it tries to abstract these occurrences of 'a' to create a function 'm := fun _a => ...', called the *motive*, with the property that 'm a' is definitionally equal to 'e'. Third, we observe that 'congrArg' implies that 'm a = m b', which can be used with lemmas such as 'Eq.mpr' to change the goal. However, if 'e' depends on specific properties of 'a', then the motive 'm' might not typecheck.

Possible solutions: use rewrite's 'occs' configuration option to limit which occurrences are rewritten, or use 'simp' or 'conv' mode, which have strategies for certain kinds of dependencies (these tactics can handle proofs and 'Decidable' instances whose types depend on the rewritten term, and 'simp' can apply user-defined '@[congr]' theorems as well).

Second, it tries to abstract these occurrences of 'a' to create a function 'm := fun _a => ...', called the *motive*, with the property that 'm a' is definitionally equal to 'e'. Third, we observe that 'congrArg' implies that 'm a = m b', which can be used with lemmas such as 'Eq.mpr' to change the goal. However, if 'e' depends on specific properties of 'a', then the motive 'm' might not typecheck.

Possible solutions: use rewrite's 'occs' configuration option to limit which occurrences are rewritten, or use 'simp' or 'conv' mode, which have strategies for certain kinds of dependencies (these tactics can handle proofs and 'Decidable' instances whose types depend on the rewritten term, and 'simp' can apply user-defined '@[congr]' theorems as well).

# AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/FlatteningStratification.lean

## exists_localizationAway_finite_mvPolynomial — L4 finiteness leaf @754 (was line 754)

### Attempt 1 (iter-021)
- **Approach:** Close the residual `hfin` finiteness conjunct of L4
  (`lem:gf_noether_clear_denominators`) by switching the existential witness from
  the provisional `g0` to `g := g0 · g1`, where `g1` clears the integral-dependence
  denominators of the `A`-algebra generators `σ`, following the iter-021 recipe in
  `analogies/gf-generic-rank-ses.md` (the collapsing-lemma route).
- **Result:** RESOLVED — **L4 finiteness leaf CLOSED, axiom-clean**
  (`#axioms = propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound`; verified via `lean_verify`).
  Full module builds GREEN under `lake build`.

### Structure of the close (all local to the existing theorem; no new top-level decls)

The proof was rebuilt in three stages, each validated incrementally with the LSP:

1. **`g1` construction (denominator clearing).** Established
   `MvPolynomial.algebraMvPolynomial` (`Algebra (MvPoly A) (MvPoly K)`) + the
   instance `MvPolynomial.isLocalization (nonZeroDivisors A) K`
   (`IsLocalization (Submonoid.map C A⁰) (MvPoly K)`). With the scalar tower
   `MvPoly A → MvPoly K → B_K` (`algPABK`/`towerPABK`), each generator
   `algebraMap B B_K x` is integral over `MvPoly K` (`hint.isIntegral`), and the
   **collapsing lemma** `IsIntegral.exists_multiple_integral_of_isLocalization`
   (path `Mathlib.RingTheory.Localization.Integral`, signature confirmed) yields
   `a ∈ A⁰` with `C a • (algebraMap B B_K x)` integral over `MvPoly A`. Set
   `g1 := ∏_{x∈σ} a`, `g := g0 · g1`.

2. **Scaffolding transfer `g0 → g`.** The `ν / ψ / b / φ / hsquare / hφ_inj`
   apparatus transferred verbatim with `g0 → g` in the localization types. Only
   `hgB_unit` changed (now via `g0 ∣ g`: `isUnit_of_dvd_unit (map_dvd …)`), and
   `hcomp` (`ν ∘ φ = gK ∘ map ψ`) was hoisted out of `hφ_inj` so the finiteness
   block can reuse it.

3. **Finiteness `hfin`.** Two sub-pieces:
   - **(I) per-generator integrality over `MvPoly A_g`.** Built
     `algAgBK := (gK ∘ map ψ).toAlgebra`, tower `MvPoly A → MvPoly A_g → B_K`
     (`IsLocalization.lift_comp` + `MvPolynomial.map_map`), and `ν` as a
     `MvPoly A_g`-algebra map `νA` (commutes' from `hcomp`). Then
     `isIntegral_algHom_iff νA hν_inj` reduces to integrality of

     `MvPoly A_g` because `aGen x ∣ g`), using `IsScalarTower.algebraMap_smul` and
     `IsUnit.val_inv_mul`.
   - **(II) `adjoin (MvPoly A_g) (image σ) = ⊤`.** First over the smaller base
     `A_g`: `Algebra.adjoin_induction` shows `algebraMap B B_g '' B ⊆ T` (the
